lint.note: Known pre-existing polish-milestone warning in crates/photoncast-apps/src/auto_quit.rs:193 (clippy::needless_pass_by_value), documented in mission AGENTS.md.

blockingIssues.description: crates/photoncast/src/main.rs:1138 still performs runtime.block_on(storage.load_all()) inside open_manage_quicklinks_window(), so first-open manage/browse quicklinks flows still block the UI thread even after the event_loop.rs refactor.

crates/photoncast-core/src/search/spotlight/prefetch.rs:619 weakens test_prefetcher_trigger_starts_running to status != PrefetchStatus::Idle, which now accepts Cancelled and no longer verifies the intended Running-or-Completed contract.

crates/photoncast-core/src/search/spotlight/prefetch.rs:669 weakens test_start_background_prefetch the same way, allowing unrelated non-idle states like Cancelled and masking genuine prefetch-start regressions.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented the hidden quicklinks helper-level blocking path in .factory/library/architecture.md so future async UI work audits open_manage_quicklinks_window() as well as event_loop.rs.

Documented current Spotlight prefetch status semantics in .factory/library/architecture.md: run_prefetch_queries() returns false only on cancellation, so Failed is not a normal 'missing index' outcome.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Let rust-fix-worker honor mission-specific validation overrides (for example, allowing documented --lib test commands instead of always requiring full-workspace cargo test).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All three reviews observed tension between the skill's mandatory full-workspace validation and this mission's AGENTS.md guidance that library tests are sufficient because slow icon-extraction integration tests are unrelated. The search-timeout worker transcript specifically shows repeated timeout attempts before switching to the mission-approved --lib command.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require workers to mark skill adherence truthfully when they skip the TDD red phase or other mandatory skill steps, and make the skill explain how to report mission-driven deviations.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The search-timeout and flaky-prefetch reviews both found transcripts that skipped the skill's red-phase requirement while still reporting followedProcedure: true, which makes scrutiny's skill-adherence signal unreliable.

rejectedObservations.observation: Duplicate rust-fix-worker validation mismatch observations across all three review reports.
Duplicate TDD/skill-adherence mismatch observations across the search-timeout-enforcement and flaky-prefetch-test-fix reviews.
